config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 10/06/2024
		Purpose: Add defects in tables. 
	"""
	area = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
	line = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
	workStation = self.view.params.station
	serialNumber=self.view.params.serialNumber
	orderNumber=self.view.params.order
	bom =self.view.params.bom
	createdBy= self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
	operatorID= self.session.custom.operatorID
	
	int(2)
	#self.session.custom.selectedUserId
	defectCategory=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("Table").custom.defectCategoryList
	defectListTable = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("Table").props.data
	selectedRow=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("Table").props.selection.selectedRow
	if(len(defectListTable) > 0):
		for row in range(len(defectListTable)):
			isSelect = defectListTable[row]['Select']
			if(str(isSelect) == 'True' or str(isSelect) == '1'):
				defectList= defectListTable[row]['DefectName']
				comment= defectListTable[row]['Comments']
				params= {'Area':area ,'Line':line, 'DefectList': defectList,'Comment':comment, 'WorkStation':workStation, 'SerialNumber':serialNumber, 'OrderNo':orderNumber, 'CreatedBy':createdBy, 'BOM':bom, 'DefectCategory':defectCategory,'OperatorId':operatorID}
				system.perspective.print(params)
				insertDetails = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/insertDefects',params)
	system.perspective.sendMessage('RefreshDefectCheck')
	system.perspective.closePopup('')

"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 10/06/2024
		Purpose: Show defects against selected defect category. 
	"""
	selectedRow=self.props.selection.selectedRow
	data= self.props.data
	for row in range (len(data)):
		defectCategory = data[selectedRow]['Defect Category']
		self.custom.defectCategory=defectCategory
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTab").getChild("tab").getChild("Table").custom.defectCategoryList = defectCategory
		system.perspective.print('defectCategory'+str(defectCategory))
		break

#To shore current value 
	valueToSet = event.value
	self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
	currentData=self.props.data

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 10/06/2024
		Purpose: Refresh table to show defects. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	serialNumber = self.view.params.serialNumber
	orderNumber =self.view.params.order
	workStationName = self.view.params.station
	params= {'SerialNumber':serialNumber,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'WorkStationName':workStationName}
	refreshedData = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getDefect',(params))
	refreshfulfilDataList=[]
	for row in range(len(refreshedData)):
		defectName = refreshedData[row]['DefectName']
		comments=refreshedData[row]['Comments']
		refreshfulfilDataList.append({"DefectName":defectName,"Comments":comments})		
		system.perspective.print('refreshfulfilDataList'+str(refreshfulfilDataList))
	self.props.data=refreshfulfilDataList

# implement your handler here
	self.refreshBinding("props.data")
	self.props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.props.selection.selectedColumn=''
